description.zh-Hans: 使用Voronoi晶体结构生成冰面/霜冻/冻结表面纹理，具有锐利的切面边界、通过分形噪波实现的霜雪累积、折射高光和裂纹图案。所有噪波均可平铺以实现无缝输出。
description.en: Generates ice / frost / frozen surface textures using Voronoi crystal structures with sharp facet boundaries, frost accumulation via fractal noise, refractive highlights, and crack patterns. All noise is tileable for seamless output.

triggers.zh-Hans: 冰面, 霜冻, 冰冻, 冰雪, 冰川, 结冰表面
triggers.en: ice, frost, frozen, icy, glacial, frozen surface

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成冰面/霜冻纹理，用于冰雪环境场景或冰冻地面材质。
exampleUsage.en: Generate ice and frost textures for frozen environment scenes or icy ground materials.
